history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly ahead to the right contains lava, so moving forward is unsafe. I should turn to face downward, where there is an open path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing downward, and the cell ahead is open floor. Moving forward safely advances me toward the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing downward again, and the cell directly ahead is open. Moving forward brings me closer to the goal on the bottom row.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the bottom-left area facing down, but the cell ahead is a wall. The goal is to my right, so I should turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right, and the cell directly ahead is empty. Moving forward advances me toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly in front of me, so I should move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
